'''Vuultin''' was a large [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]]. It had no strategic value. It was built to the east of [[Oradin]].<ref name="XWING" />

{{City-stub}}
